title: cestichis pedicellaris
intro: Cestichis pedicellaris, also known as the Pedicellaris orchid, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It is a type of orchid that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cestichis pedicellaris include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its antimalarial properties. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, with the roots and leaves being used in traditional medicine to create remedies for various ailments.
